expo.name: QR-C by Type C

infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app uses Face ID to provide a secure and convenient way to log in to your account.
infoPlist.NSLocalAuthenticationUsageDescription: This app uses Face ID/Touch ID to provide a secure and convenient way to log in to your account.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to scan QR codes for payments

expo.description: Simplify event sales and payments with secure QR-based transactions. Perfect for managing purchases, digital wallets, and passes at events. Features include: Quick QR scanning for instant payments, secure digital wallet management, real-time transaction processing, easy pass and product management, Face ID/Touch ID security. Ideal for event organizers and vendors looking for a reliable point-of-sale solution.
